verses.text: Kihilh napi-in a mang nuamlote bawlphat zawh nawnloh dongin kisia ding uh hi
Midikte in gam a uk ciangin gammite lungdam uh a, migilote in a uk ciangin a gammite thum uh hi
Pilna a deih mi in a pa lungdamsak a, numei paktat tawh a kikhawl mi in a neihsa teng lawnmang hi
Thumanin a gamta kumpi in a gam kipsak a, sum bek a ngaihsun kumpi in a gam siasak hi
A manlopi-in mi khat mawkphatna pen a awkna dingin thangsiahna ahi hi
Migilote amau mawhna sungah awkcip a, midikte ahih leh suakta-in lungdam uh hi
Midikte in mi cimawhte-a' ding thu khual uh a, migilote in tua bang thukhualna theilo uh hi
Thu a khuallote in khuasungah buaina lianpi piangsak a, mipilte in tua buaina daisak thei hi
Mipil khat in mihai khat tawh zumah thu nei leh mipilpa tungah hehin zahko a, phattuamna piang tuanlo hi
Mi a that nuamte in a thuman mi mudah a, midikte in a thuman mi hu uh hi
Mihaipa a hehna bangin kam pau-in gamta gawp a, mipilpa ahih leh ki-ipin a hehna damsak hi
Kumpipa in zuauthu saangin na sem leh a nuai-a ulian khempeuh zong zuaugenin nitum ding uh hi
Mizawngpa leh mi bawlsiapa a kibatna uh khat om hi. Topa in a nih tuakun mittang guan' hi
Kumpipa in mizawngte' thu a manin khensak leh a ukna kip tawntung ding hi
Ciangduai leh tai-na in pilna guan' a, a kikhahkhong ta in a nu maizumsak hi
Migilote ulian suak leh siatna khang semsem a, ahi zongin midikte in amau' mit mahmah tawh a gilo uliante' zakiatna mu ding uh hi
Na ta thuhilhin tai lecin ama hangin na kipak ding a, na lung hong kimsak ding hi
Pasian' lamlahna a kizuih lohna gamah gamsung mite pheengtat gawp uh hi. Pasian' thukham a zui mite ahih leh a lungdam uh hi
Kama hilh lel tawh silate pil zolo a, a theih hangun hong mang tuanlo hi
Thu ngaihsun loin a pheeng paupau mipa sangin mihaipa-a' dingin lametna omzaw lai hi
Sila khat a neu tunga kipan limtakin na khoi hangin a tawpna-ah nang hong hehsak veve ding hi
A heh pahpahte in kitotna piangsak a, a heh baihte khial thei tawntung hi
A kiphasakte in niamkhiatna thuak ding a, a kiniamkhiatte in pahtawina ngah ding hi
Guktakna sungah a kipawl mipa ama-a' dingin thusia zongpa ahi hi. A guktakna pulak leh amah gim kipia ding a, genkhia kei leh lah Pasian in samsia veve ding hi
Midangte kihtakna in hong lunghimawhsak a, Topa muan'na in hong lungmuangsak hi
Mi khempeuh in gam ukte' maipha ngah ding hanciam ciat uh a, ahi zongin Topa' kiang pan bekin thutang kingah hi
Midikte in migilote mudah uh a, migilote in midikte mudah uh hi.
